source: attention.pdf (Attention Is All You Need, 15p, single-column NeurIPS'17)
note: Tool-agnostic ground truth. Scores are derived deterministically from a defect ledger plus a fixed rate card, not set by hand. Each item starts at 1.0: P0 -> 0 and +1 silent-error / P1 -0.5 / P2 -0.2 / P3 -0.05, floored at 0. Dimension score = sum(item scores) / true item count x 100; fabricated items are tracked on a separate fabrication axis.

headings._desc: Numbered sections are the true headings. Level is inferred from numbering: level 1 (9) = Abstract/1/2/3/4/5/6/7/References; level 2 (12) = 3.1-3.5, 5.1-5.4, 6.1-6.3; level 3 (3) = 3.2.1-3.2.3. 24+ headings total. Judged on: presence (recall) and level correctness (numbering present but flattened = P3 recoverable; wrong nesting = P2).
headings.not_headings_desc: The 7 author names belong to the cover author block. Marking them as # headings is a fabricated heading (a precision defect, one false-positive counted each).

junctions._desc: Reading-order-sensitive junctions: places that should stay connected but easily break. A break = P1.
junctions.J1_footnote_p1: The first-page footnote (Equal contribution / Listing order is random) should be a footnote, not shoved into the top of the body text or into the attention block.
junctions.J2_fig1_flow: Where Figure 1 (the overall architecture diagram, p3) is inserted, the surrounding body text should stay semantically continuous and not be split mid-sentence by the figure.
junctions.J3_eq_flow: The formulas in 3.2/3.3 (F1, FFN, etc.) should have continuous body text before and after; the formula should not break a sentence.
junctions.J4_table_caption: The captions for Tables 1-4 should stay adjacent to their own table bodies and not be displaced elsewhere.
junctions.J5_pagebreak: At page breaks, paragraphs should not be cut apart by headers/footers/page numbers.

anchors._desc: Key facts that must survive verbatim. Missing = 0; silently changed to something else = P0. The probe only checks presence; whether a value was altered must be verified by eye on that line.

items.truth: 41.8 (41.0 before erratum; tagged source, not penalized)

table.truth: Table 1: complexity per layer (Self-Attention O(n^2*d), etc.)
